weapon.name: Close Quarters
weapon.description: Deal additional Weapon Damage when in close range to your target.

weapon.name: Headshot Booster
weapon.description: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals .

weapon.name: Restorative Shot
weapon.description: Your next bullet will heal you based on what target you hit.

weapon.name: Opening Rounds
weapon.description: Your attacks have additional Weapon Damage against enemies above % health.

weapon.name: Long Range
weapon.description: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

weapon.name: Slowing Bullets
weapon.description: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

weapon.name: Spirit Shredder Bullets
weapon.description: Your bullets apply a debuff that reduces the Spirit Resist of the target and grants you and your allies Spirit Lifesteal against them.

weapon.name: Weakening Headshot
weapon.description: Landing a Headshot on Heroes reduces their Bullet Resist.

weapon.name: Mystic Shot
weapon.description: Your next bullet deals bonus Spirit Damage.

weapon.name: Kinetic Dash
weapon.description: When you Dash-Jump you gain Fire Rate and bonus Ammo until your next reload. Lasts up to s.

weapon.name: Melee Charge
weapon.description: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage.

weapon.name: Intensifying Magazine
weapon.description: Increases Weapon Damage as you continuously fire your weapon.

weapon.name: Split Shot
weapon.description: Make your weapon fire multishot. Hitting more than one Hero per attack will grant a stacking weapon damage bonus. Targets can only be hit once per multishot.

weapon.name: Active Reload
weapon.description: While reloading, pressing during the highlighted portion will instantly finish your reload and grant you Fire Rate, Bullet Lifesteal and Move Speed.

weapon.name: Stalker
weapon.description: Dealing at close range opens a wound and grants you . Wounded enemies take , have reduced , and are revealed through walls.

weapon.name: Recharging Rush
weapon.description: Dealing significant replenishes a charge for each of your charged abilities.

weapon.name: Cultlist Sacrifice
weapon.description: Target an enemy NPC and consume it for % Bonus Souls and grants a powerful long lasting buff.

weapon.name: Tesla Bullets
weapon.description: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.

weapon.name: Hollow Point
weapon.description: When you are above % health, deal additional Weapon Damage and your bullets reduce enemy Bullet Resist.

weapon.name: Weighted Shots
weapon.description: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

weapon.name: Heroic Aura
weapon.description: Provides Bullet Resist to nearby friendly units.

weapon.name: Berserker
weapon.description: Your Weapon Damage increases as you take sustained damage.

weapon.name: Sharpshooter
weapon.description: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

weapon.name: Headhunter
weapon.description: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals , you, and briefly grants .

weapon.name: Point Blank
weapon.description: When in close range to your target, gain Weapon Damage and your bullets apply a Movement Slow.

weapon.name: Toxic Bullets
weapon.description: Your bullets build up a Bleed on enemies, causing them to lose a percentage of their Max Health over time. Also applies Healing Reduction on the bleeding target.

weapon.name: Hunter's Aura
weapon.description: Reduces nearby enemies' Bullet Resist and Fire Rate. If there is only one enemy hero nearby, this effect is doubled.

weapon.name: Alchemical Fire
weapon.description: Throw a flask that explodes on contact, creating an area that does increasing Spirit Damage per second and reduces enemy Bullet Resist.% less effective vs non-heroes.

weapon.name: Blood Tribute
weapon.description: Toggle: Continually sacrifice Health to improve , Debuff Resistance and Move Speed.

weapon.name: Burst Fire
weapon.description: Briefly gain Fire Rate and Move Speed when one of your bullets hits an enemy hero.

weapon.name: Escalating Resilience
weapon.description: Grants Bullet Resist when your bullets hit an enemy hero. Each shot can only grant one stack.

weapon.name: Express Shot
weapon.description: Your next attack will fire twice in quick succession with increased damage and velocity. This attack consumes extra ammo.

weapon.name: Ballistic Enchantment
weapon.description: Imbue an ability with increased range. Dealing damage with that ability grants you increased weapon damage per unique hero hit. Has reduced effect on non-heroes.

weapon.name: Capacitor
weapon.description: Launch a projectile that deals damage, applies a strong slow that recovers over time, prevents Stamina usage and Silences their movement-based items and abilities.

weapon.name: Silencer
weapon.description: Your bullets build up to a Silence. Victims are immune to the build up for s after silence expires.

weapon.name: Lucky Shot
weapon.description: Your bullets have a chance to be empowered, causing them to deal bonus weapon damage on hit.Bonus damage cannot Crit.

weapon.name: Ricochet
weapon.description: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

weapon.name: Spiritual Overflow
weapon.description: Gain bonus Fire Rate, Spirit Power and Ability Duration by charging up when shooting enemy heroes.

weapon.name: Shadow Weave
weapon.description: Become Stealthed. Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed.

weapon.name: Glass Cannon
weapon.description: Each hero kill grants permanent Fire Rate (up to a max of times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

weapon.name: Crushing Fists
weapon.description: Your will restore ammo and apply a stacking bullet resist debuff on enemies. Heavy melee applies 2 stacks. If the target reaches max stacks, they will be stunned.

weapon.name: Armor Piercing Rounds
weapon.description: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance.

weapon.name: Enchanted Holsters
weapon.description: While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed. Each stack refreshes the duration.

weapon.name: Infinite Rounds
weapon.description: You have infinite ammo.

weapon.name: Haunting Shot
weapon.description: Your next bullet applies a powerful debuff reducing the enemy's damage output, healing and movement speed. It also deals based on the targets current Health. The bullet is larger and penetrates through targets.

weapon.name: Runed Gauntlets
weapon.description: Everytime you land a heavy melee, your existing cooldowns get reduced.

vitality.name: Melee Lifesteal
vitality.description: Your next Melee attack heals you. This heal is % effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is x as long for Light Melee hits.

vitality.name: Rebuttal
vitality.description: On a successful Parry against an enemy Hero, Heal yourself for the damage parried and returns that damage to the target, and temporarily gain increased damage.

vitality.name: Healing Rite
vitality.description: Grant Regen and Sprint Speed to the target. Gets dispelled if you take damage from enemy players or objectives. Can be self-cast.

vitality.name: Debuff Reducer
vitality.description: Reduces the duration of all negative effects applied to you.

vitality.name: Healing Booster
vitality.description: Increases the effectiveness of your healing.

vitality.name: Enduring Speed
vitality.description: Reduces the effect of enemy Move Speed penalties.

vitality.name: Emergency Shielding
vitality.description: Gain a Barrier whenever you take significant from enemy Heroes in a small time frame.

vitality.name: Spirit Bubble
vitality.description: Gain a Barrier whenever you take significant from enemy Heroes in a small time frame.

vitality.name: Battle Vest
vitality.description: While you are above % health, gain and .

vitality.name: Enchanter's Emblem
vitality.description: While you are above % health, gain bonus and Cooldown Reduction.

vitality.name: Return Fire
vitality.description: Automatically fire a bullet towards any attacker who damages you with their abilities or weapon.

vitality.name: Healbane
vitality.description: Your Spirit Damage applies Healing Reduction. If an enemy hero dies under this effect, you receive a large heal.

vitality.name: Guardian Ward
vitality.description: Provide the target with a Barrier and temporary Move Speed. Can be self-cast.Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

vitality.name: Reactive Barrier
vitality.description: Automatically restores one stamina and gain a Barrier when you are movement locked, Stunned, Chained, Immobilized, or Slept.

vitality.name: Counterspell
vitality.description: Your next parry protects you from the damage and effects of enemy abilities and items. On a successful spell parry and gain and .

vitality.name: Spirit Resilience
vitality.description: When below % health, gain additional Spirit Resist.

vitality.name: Bullet Resilience
vitality.description: When below % health, gain additional Bullet Resist.

vitality.name: Metal Skin
vitality.description: Become immune to bullets.

vitality.name: Fortitude
vitality.description: After not taking damage for a period, gain health regen.

vitality.name: Trophy Collector
vitality.description: Whenever you score an assist or kill, gain extra health, sprint, ability range and passive soul generation. This effect stacks and persists through death.

vitality.name: Rescue Beam
vitality.description: Heals a target allied hero and yourself for a percentage of Max Health. Once while healing, you can Pull the target towards you. Can be self-cast.

vitality.name: Warp Stone
vitality.description: Teleport straight ahead, gaining Bullet Resist.

vitality.name: Majestic Leap
vitality.description: Launch yourself high into the air and grant yourself a Barrier. While in the air, you can use the active again to drop down faster.Cannot be used for s if attacked by enemy Hero.

vitality.name: Healing Nova
vitality.description: Heal yourself and nearby allies.

vitality.name: Lifestrike
vitality.description: Your Melee Attack applies Movement Slow and heals you for a percentage of the Melee Damage dealt plus a fixed amount. This heal is % effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is x as long for Light Melee hits.

vitality.name: Veil Walker
vitality.description: Walking through a cosmic veil grants you Stealth, Heal and increased Move Speed.

vitality.name: Inhibitor
vitality.description: Your bullets build up to reduce the target's outgoing damage and apply healing reduction.

vitality.name: Leech
vitality.description: Reduces the effect of enemy applied healing reduction.

vitality.name: Phantom Strike
vitality.description: Teleport to an enemy target and pull them to the ground. Dealing damage, Move speed reduction and Disarm.

vitality.name: Infuser
vitality.description: Gain Spirit Lifesteal and Spirit Power.

vitality.name: Divine Barrier
vitality.description: Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed. Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

vitality.name: Unstoppable
vitality.description: Temporarily suppress negative status effects and become immune to Stun, Silence, Sleep, Root, and Disarm. Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept.

vitality.name: Colossus
vitality.description: Grow larger in size, gaining , , and . Nearby enemies suffer from and have reduced dash speed.

vitality.name: Diviner's Kevlar
vitality.description: Upon casting an ultimate ability gain a Barrier and temporary Spirit Power.

vitality.name: Witchmail
vitality.description: Taking heavy hits of from an enemy reduces a random ability cooldown.

vitality.name: Healing Tempo
vitality.description: Applying to yourself or an ally grants the target and .Does not apply on innate Regen or passive Bullet/Spirit Lifesteals.

vitality.name: Plated Armor
vitality.description: Gain a chance to either deflect incoming bullets, preventing all or prevent all on-hit effects from bullets.

vitality.name: Spellbreaker
vitality.description: The next instance of high spirit damage you take is significantly reduced.

vitality.name: Seraphim Wings
vitality.description: When Airborne, You deal more damage and take reduced damage. Allows an additional use of Air Jump or Air Dash before landing.

vitality.name: Nullification Burst
vitality.description: Removes any positive buffs and prevents stamina usage and healing effects on enemies.

vitality.name: Celestial Blessing
vitality.description: Applies an extremely powerful cleanse that replenishes your allies globally.

vitality.name: Eternal Gift
vitality.description: Periodically gain a random permanent stat buff.

vitality.name: Cloak of Opportunity
vitality.description: Block the next debuff that would apply movement lock, Stun, Chained, Immobilize, or Sleep and become Unstoppable. Also gain a Barrier and bonus

vitality.name: Electric Slippers
vitality.description: When sliding, evade bullets, gain fire rate and deal damage to enemies around you. Cooldown is per target.

vitality.name: Shadow Strike
vitality.description: Go Invisible on Stamina use with no detection range. Doing a melee attack while invisible will cause you to steal bullet and spirit resistance from them and deal damage over time.

spirit.name: Mystic Regeneration
spirit.description: Dealing Spirit Damage to enemy Heroes grants you Bonus Health Regen. Stacks when dealing damage to different heroes.

spirit.name: Mystic Expansion
spirit.description: Imbue an ability to increase its range and effect radius.

spirit.name: Mystic Burst
spirit.description: Charges up over time with , causing abilities dealing more than damage to deal additional damage.

spirit.name: Rusted Barrel
spirit.description: Target an enemy to reduce their Fire Rate and Bullet Resistance.

spirit.name: Spirit Strike
spirit.description: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, deal extra Spirit Damage with the attack and reduce the target's Spirit Resist.Cooldown is x longer for Light Melee hits.

spirit.name: Golden Goose Egg
spirit.description: Gain souls over time, as long as you are alive.

spirit.name: Bullet Resist Shredder
spirit.description: Reduces Bullet Resist on enemies when you deal Spirit Damage.

spirit.name: Mystic Vulnerability
spirit.description: When an enemy takes Spirit Damage, they have their Spirit Resist reduced.

spirit.name: Mystic Slow
spirit.description: When the target takes Spirit Damage, they have their Move Speed reduced.

spirit.name: Compress Cooldown
spirit.description: Imbue an ability to reduce its Cooldown.

spirit.name: Slowing Hex
spirit.description: Slows movement of enemy target. Also Silences their movement-based items and abilities.Increases the target's gravity.Does not affect target's stamina usage.

spirit.name: Spirit Sap
spirit.description: Target an enemy to reduce their Spirit Resist and Spirit Power.

spirit.name: Arcane Surge
spirit.description: When you Dash-Jump the next ability you use will have bonus Range, Duration, and Spirit Power. Lasts up to s.

spirit.name: Cold Front
spirit.description: Release an expanding ice blast that deals Spirit Damage and Slows targets it hits.

spirit.name: Duration Extender
spirit.description: Imbue an ability to increase its Duration.

spirit.name: Suppressor
spirit.description: When you deal Spirit Damage to enemies, you also reduce their Fire Rate.

spirit.name: Quicksilver Reload
spirit.description: Your imbued ability charges up over time with , , and bonus bullets on use.

spirit.name: Silence Wave
spirit.description: Launch an expanding projectile which Silences enemies for a short duration and deals impact damage. Silence does not interrupt channeling abilities.

spirit.name: Greater Expansion
spirit.description: Increases the range and effect radius of your abilities and items.

spirit.name: Tankbuster
spirit.description: Charges up over time with , causing abilities dealing more than damage to deal additional damage. Ignores Spirit Resistance.

spirit.name: Superior Cooldown
spirit.description: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities.

spirit.name: Disarming Hex
spirit.description: Disarms enemy target and reduces their Bullet Resist.

spirit.name: Decay
spirit.description: Inflict damage over time to a target, dealing damage based on their current health.Decay's damage is non-lethal and does not apply item procs.

spirit.name: Knockdown
spirit.description: Apply a Stun after s. Stun duration is increased against airborne targets.Increases the target's gravity for the duration of the stun.

spirit.name: Torment Pulse
spirit.description: Periodically deals Spirit Damage to the closest two enemies nearby.

spirit.name: Superior Duration
spirit.description: Increases the duration of your abilities and items.

spirit.name: Spirit Snatch
spirit.description: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, the attack deals extra Spirit Damage and steals Spirit Resist and Spirit Power.Effects are reduced to % for Light Melee hits.

spirit.name: Radiant Regeneration
spirit.description: Heal and gain bonus Movement Speed for a short duration when you cast an ability.

spirit.name: Surge of Power
spirit.description: Imbue an ability with permanent Spirit Power. When that ability is used, gain bonus Move Speed and maintain full speed while attacking.

spirit.name: Escalating Exposure
spirit.description: Dealing Spirit Damage applies a stacking Spirit Amp that increases your Spirit Damage to the target.

spirit.name: Transcendent Cooldown
spirit.description: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities and items.

spirit.name: Focus Lens
spirit.description: Target an enemy to Silence them. A portion of all damage dealt during the silence gets applied to the target when the silence wears off.

spirit.name: Scourge
spirit.description: Apply Spirit Resist and an aura on a friendly target that deals damage to enemies proportional to their max health. Can be self cast.

spirit.name: Refresher
spirit.description: Reset the cooldown of all your abilities and restore all your charges.

spirit.name: Arctic Blast
spirit.description: Release an expanding ice blast that deals Spirit Damage, Freezing and then Slowing targets it hits. Targets take increased damage while frozen.

spirit.name: Ethereal Shift
spirit.description: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist.Can be canceled early.Activation cancels any active ability.

spirit.name: Cursed Relic
spirit.description: Curses an enemy - interrupting, Silencing, Disarming, and preventing item usage. Removes all non-ultimate buffs.

spirit.name: Mercurial Magnum
spirit.description: Your imbued ability charges up over time with , , and reloads bullets on use. Until your next reload, your bullets deal bonus Spirit Damage based on your Spirit Power.

spirit.name: Magic Carpet
spirit.description: Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet. Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

spirit.name: Spirit Burn
spirit.description: Dealing significant Spirit Damage to an enemy within s causes an explosion dealing damage and a burn to nearby enemies. While burning, enemies take damage over time and receive reduced healing.Deals half-damage and has half-cooldown on non-heroes.

spirit.name: Lightning Scroll
spirit.description: Damage from your ultimate applies a and deals after a short delay.

spirit.name: Omnicharge Signet
spirit.description: Imbue any active non-ultimate ability with Bonus Ability Charges. Already charged abilities receive more bonus charges.

spirit.name: Shrink Ray
spirit.description: Reduces Model Size and grants Move Speed to the target. Allows usage of tunnels in this mode. Can be self-cast.

spirit.name: Mystical Piano
spirit.description: After a short delay, enemies in the target area will be stunned and have their stamina depleted. After the stun they will be temporarily dazed.

spirit.name: Mystic Conduit
spirit.description: Provides yourself and allies with a powerful spirit focused aura. Has reduced values on allies.

spirit.name: Prism Blast
spirit.description: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which lasers blast out and rotate around you.

spirit.name: Unstable Concoction
spirit.description: Consume a concoction that grants you increased speed, health, spirit and weapon damage. After a short duration you die and explode, stunning nearby enemies and dealing damage based on your maximum health.

spirit.name: Frostbite Charm
spirit.description: Imbued ability has its Cooldown reduced and gains Spirit Power. When the ability deals damage, freeze the target and apply bonus damage. Cooldown is per target.
